title: Bomb's AOT Additions
description: This datapack adds many new features to Shingeki no Craft, made by Fanfo.
body:
# BAA has reached EOL
I have lost the motivation that I used to have for working on BAA, and I would like to work on more original projects that I have more motivation to work on. This does not mean I will be leaving the SNC community, and maybe things will change in the future and I will return to BAA, but for the foreseeable future BAA will not be receiving any new updates.

# What is BAA?
Bomb's AOT Additions, or BAA, is an addon to Fanfo's [Shingeki no Craft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shingeki-no-craft) Datapack, which adds many new features.

# Getting Started
The first thing you will notice when playing is that you can't craft any of the items added in SNC. Instead, you must craft a Heavy Workbench and Research Table to begin. After researching a blueprint, you must put it into a nearby chiseled bookshelf for it to take effect.

![Heavy Workbench Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6416a92f0646f505e9a859003aefb9e959d698f3.png)
![Research Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64f947f4aead645626499a7b10c51db065c51e8d.png)

Once you have researched Ultrahard Steel and want to make some blades, you must first smelt Iron Ingots inside a Blast Furnace to obtain Ultrahard Steel Ingots. This can then be used to craft Ultrahard Steel Blades.

![Research Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d27e9e181d571ba2675086b98a0bfd4fdf587ca.png)

# Other Features
Some other miscellaneous features include not dropping your items on the floor when unshifting, a horse mutation system to try and breed the best horse, some cosmetics you can get from killing titans, and being able to disable the end/nether on world creation. 

# Installation 
When installing this datapack, the load order is very important. To make sure everything works properly, make sure that you set the load order as:
- [SNC](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shingeki-no-craft)
- [SODA](https://sncraft.fanfus.com/snc-official-developer-api)
- [BAA](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bombs-aot-additions)
